---
title: "Anna Gurney"
---

## Anna Gurney

**Dates:** (1795-1857)

### Description

philanthropist

### Biography

She was the subject of an essay by Sarah Austin in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
